downloadDescription: The Azure VPN Client lets you connect to Azure securely from anywhere in the world. It supports Azure Active Directory, certificate-based and RADIUS authentication.
detailsSection:
The Azure VPN Client lets you connect to Azure securely from anywhere in the world. It supports Azure Active Directory, certificate-based and RADIUS authentication.

We have transitioned from App Center to the Microsoft Download Center. This release introduces the following enhancements:

- Device-based Single Sign-On (SSO) authentication support
- Reduced toast notification frequency in scenarios that require user interaction, improving overall user experience
systemRequirementsSection: Windows 10, Windows 11, Windows Server 2022, Windows Server 2026
installInstructionSection:
1.Enable Sideload mode (if OS version is lower than Windows 10 version 19041).
2.Double click on .msixbundle file and Click on install.

Follow these instructions if .msixbundle file is not double clickable:
1.Extract the downloaded zip file.
2.Enable Developer mode.
3.Run Install.ps1 with powershell.
